message:
fix(codegen): Improve VM fallback handling for core2 tests

- Add VM fallback with proper termination for attribute assignments on
  uncertain targets (fixes invalid lvalue assignment like
  `runtime.eval(...) = value`)
- Add discard pattern `_ = &var;` for variables assigned from VM
  fallback to suppress unused warnings
- Add lowercase aliases (defaultdict, deque, ordereddict) to
  collections module for Python compatibility
- Improve needsVMFallback detection for renamed variables and local
  vars
- Add isInsideStringLiteral check to skip false positives in discard
  emission

This fixes several issues that were causing core2 test failures:
- test_defaultdict now compiles and passes
- Invalid attribute assignment syntax errors resolved
- Unused variable warnings for VM fallback variables resolved
